2606.26003.title: Dziri Voicebot: An End-to-End Low-Resource Speech-to-Speech Conversational System for Algerian Dialect
2606.26003.paper_summary: Automatic speech and language technologies are still heavily biased toward high-resource languages, limiting their applicability to dialectal and low-resource settings such as Algerian Dialect. This language presents additional challenges including lack of standardized orthography, frequent codeswitching with French, and scarcity of annotated speech resources. This paper addresses the problem of building a complete speech-to-speech conversational system for Algerian Dialect. We propose a modular pipeline integrating automatic speech recognition, natural language understanding, retrieval-augmented generation, and text-to-speech synthesis within a unified architecture. This work is the continuation of our previous work on Algerian dialectal conversational systems Bechiri and Lanasri [2026], extending it from text-based dialogue modeling to full speech-based interaction. We constructed dedicated datasets for ASR, NLU, and TTS in the telecom domain and fine-tune pretrained models for each component. The ASR system is built on Whisper-based adaptation, while the NLU module combines transformer-based embeddings with a task-oriented dialogue framework. A neural TTS system is trained on a newly collected dialectal corpus to enable spoken response generation. Experimental results show strong performance across all components, including low word error rate for ASR, high intent classification and entity recognition scores for NLU, and stable speech synthesis quality. The proposed system provides a reproducible baseline for end-to-end conversational modeling in Algerian Dialect.
2606.26003.paper_summary_zh: 自動語音和語言技術仍然高度偏向高資源語言，限制了它們在阿爾及利亞方言等方言和低資源環境中的應用。這種語言面臨額外挑戰，包括缺乏標準化正字法、與法語的頻繁代碼切換，以及標註語音資源的稀缺。本文針對建立一個完整的阿爾及利亞方言語音到語音對話系統的問題進行探討。我們提出了一個模組化的流程，將自動語音識別、自然語言理解、檢索增強生成和文本到語音合成整合在一個統一的架構中。這項工作是我們之前在阿爾及利亞方言對話系統 Bechiri 和 Lanasri [2026] 上工作的延續，將其從基於文本的對話建模擴展到完整的基於語音的互動。我們為電信領域構建了專用數據集，以進行 ASR、NLU 和 TTS，並對每個組件進行預訓練模型的微調。ASR 系統基於 Whisper 的適應，而 NLU 模塊則將基於Transformer的嵌入與任務導向對話框架相結合。一個神經 TTS 系統在新收集的方言語料庫上進行訓練，以實現口語回應生成。實驗結果顯示所有組件的強勁性能，包括 ASR 的低字錯誤率、NLU 的高意圖分類和實體識別分數，以及穩定的語音合成質量。所提出的系統為阿爾及利亞方言的端到端對話建模提供了一個可重複的基準。
2606.26003.author: Dihia Lanasri et.al.
2606.26003.authors: Dihia Lanasri, Fairouz Taki, Asma Kemmoum
